message:
Fix npm publish workflow

Use Node 24 and plain npm publish to match the working trusted
publishing setup used by pi-tenzir. This removes the older npm 10
publish path that failed to publish pi-mcporter 0.2.0 from GitHub
Actions.

files.patch:
@@ -21,11 +21,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: "20"
+          node-version: "24"
           registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: npm ci
 
       - name: Publish package
-        run: npm publish --provenance --access public
+        run: npm publish
